top_stories.title: A roadmap for AI, if anyone will listen
top_stories.description: The Pro-Human Declaration was finalized before last week's Pentagon-Anthropic standoff, but the collision of the two events wasn’t lost on anyone involved.
top_stories.author: Connie Loizos
top_stories.content: The Pro-Human Declaration was finalized before last week's Pentagon-Anthropic standoff, but the collision of the two events wasn’t lost on anyone involved.

top_stories.title: Yann LeCun’s New AI Paper Argues AGI Is Misdefined and Introduces Superhuman Adaptable Intelligence (SAI) Instead
top_stories.description: What if the AI industry is optimizing for a goal that cannot be clearly defined or reliably measured? That is the central argument of a new paper by Yann LeCun, and his team, which claims that Artificial General Intelligence has become an overloaded term used in inconsistent ways across academia and industry. The research team […] The post Yann LeCun’s New AI Paper Argues AGI Is Misdefined and Introduces Superhuman Adaptable Intelligence (SAI) Instead appeared first on MarkTechPost.
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: What if the AI industry is optimizing for a goal that cannot be clearly defined or reliably measured? top_stories.title: NVIDIA and Partners Show That Software-Defined AI-RAN Is the Next Wireless Generation
top_stories.description: AI-RAN is moving from lab to field, showing that a software-defined approach is the only viable way to build future AI-native wireless networks. Ahead of Mobile World Congress (MWC), running March 2-5 in Barcelona, NVIDIA and Nokia announced new AI-RAN collaborations with top telecom operators across Europe, Asia and North America, powered by NVIDIA AI-RAN […]
top_stories.author: Kanika Atri
top_stories.content: AI-RAN is moving from lab to field, showing that a software-defined approach is the only viable way to build future AI-native wireless networks. Ahead of Mobile World Congress (MWC), running March 2-5 in Barcelona, NVIDIA and Nokia announced new AI-RAN collaborations with top telecom operators across Europe, Asia and North America, powered by NVIDIA AI-RAN […]

top_stories.title: Intelligence isn’t about parameter count. It’s about time.
top_stories.description: As AI models grow larger, they become less insightful, not more. To ensure that they continue to learn, we need to reduce their inference time.
top_stories.author: Stefano Soatto
top_stories.content: As AI models grow larger, they become less insightful, not more. To ensure that they continue to learn, we need to reduce their inference time.

top_stories.title: Lantronix Expands Embedded Compute with MediaTek
top_stories.description: Strategic expansion strengthens multi-silicon platform strategy, broadens addressable market and accelerates growth across Industrial IoT and Edge AI Lantronix Inc. (Nasdaq: LTRX), a global leader in compute and connectivity IoT solutions powering Edge AI applications, today announced a significant strategic expansion of its embedded compute platform through new System-on-Module (SOM) solutions... The post Lantronix Expands Embedded Compute with MediaTek first appeared on AI-Tech Park.
